title: Daughter of Deceit
writer: Carlos Arniches, Luis Alcoriza, Janet Alcoriza
actors: Fernando Soler, Alicia Caro, Fernando Soto
plot: After discovering he's being cheated on by his wife María, Quintin kicks her out of the house. Upon leaving, his wife confesses that their daughter Martha is actually not Quintin'd daughter. Quintin abandons the child in front of ...
